title: Cheap Gaps
description: Customize golden apple and recipe with an easy GUI including a toggleable EGap craft using gold blocks.
body:
**Features:**
- Players can customize golden apple recipes via a GUI. (click on materials or golden apple to - change them)
- Toggle a EGap Crafts in GUI
  Confirm or reset custom recipes without restarting the server.

**Commands:**
- **/cheapgaps** Opens the customization GUI **(OP required)**


![CheapGaps GUI](https://i.imgur.com/bF1xMfH.png)

![Default Gap Craft](https://i.imgur.com/fiWPX8Y.png)

![Egap Craft](https://i.imgur.com/rAcxJ0j.png)
